name: GT-Pprops
source: Prior VALIDATED registry lemma lem-P-properties (proofs/lem-P-properties/export.md, root node 1). Conclusions: P=theta(2Phi-1) satisfies P^2=P, P(1)=1, P real-linear on B(H)_sa, ||P||<=1+C eta, delta:=||P-Phi||<=C eta, delta-positivity. Here this lemma uses ONLY: (a) P(1)=1 [node 1.4 of lem-P-properties], and (b) P is real-linear on B(H)_sa [node 1.6 of lem-P-properties].
